name: Tropical Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 broiler fryer chicken (3-1/2 to 4 lbs), cut up
3 cups pineapple chunks, fresh or canned
1 hot red pepper, seeded and chopped
8 ounces water chestnuts, canned, sliced, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet over medium heat, brown the chicken in 2 tablespoons of oil; remove and set aside.
2. In the same skillet, saut onion and garlic in remaining oil until tender.
3. Add tomatoes, pineapple, pineapple juice, red pepper, salt, and pepper and water chestnuts.
4. Return chicken to the pan; bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat; cover and simmer for 45 minutes.
6. Add peas and chives; cover and simmer for 10-15 minutes or until peas are tender and chicken juices run clear.
7. Thicken pan juices if desired. Serve over rice.
